member.name: T:CDR.Register.Discovery.API.Business.Responses.IResponseRegisterDataHolderBrandList`1
member.summary: Response with list of DH Brands.

member.name: M:CDR.Register.Discovery.API.Controllers.DiscoveryController.CheckSoftwareProduct
member.summary: Performs checks against the software product id from the access token.
member.returns: An ActionResult if there is an error to return, otherwise null if there are no issues.
